description: Câmara dos Deputados open data — propositions, deputies, votations, expenses. 100% free, no API key required.

proposicoes.notes: List propositions (PL, PEC, MP, etc). Pass siglaTipo=PL&numero=N&ano=YYYY to find a specific bill, or keywordsList=<term> to search by topic.

deputado.notes: Deputy profile by id. Returns full name, party, state, current legislature, contact info.

deputados.notes: Search deputies by name, party (siglaPartido=PT), state (siglaUf=SP), or current legislature. Default returns active deputies.
